extortion.description: The company "dpfza.gov.dj" represents the Djibouti Ports & Free Zones Authority, responsible for managing the strategic ports and free zones in Djibouti. It plays a crucial role in facilitating international trade and logistics, offering state-of-the-art facilities and services to boost economic growth and regional connectivity. The authority aims to position Djibouti as a leading maritime and commercial hub in Africa.
